name: Applesauce Oat Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Ground cinnamon or pumpkin pie spice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together flour, oat bran, packed brown sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon or pumpkin pie spice.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the applesauce, water, vegetable oil, and egg whites. Beat with a fork until blended.
3. Add the applesauce mixture to the flour mixture. Mix at medium speed until all ingredients are moistened.
4. Grease muffin tins with margarine or line with paper liners.
5. Fill each muffin tin about halfway full with batter.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are browned and spring back when touched in the center.
7. Serve hot if possible.
